title: An Foid / An Chud
about: An Foid / An Chud refers to a series of ironic memes that recaption other templates with the slang terms "foid" and "chud" and intentionally misuse "an" instead of "a" before the noun. The trend developed into slang overload posts that used words like foid, chud, Diddy, Diddy Blud and Agartha, among others. The memes seemingly mocked the earnest use of foid online by incels, by using "an foid" to symbolize low intellect. The memes originally surfaced on Instagram in November 2025, later spreading to X / Twitter and TikTok.
origin:
On November 26th, 2025, Instagram[1] user @jonkye4 shared a recaptioned graphic T-shirt image, making it read, "My sister is an foid," gaining over 7,800 likes in a month.

Earlier on that same day, Instagram[8] user @jonkye4 shared a meme that recaptioned "the foids" into a Will Smith Slapping Chris Rock meme with Elon Musk photoshopped over Smith and Russian President Vladimir Putin photoshopped over Rock. The caption read, "How I feel after I slap the foids and won the conversation." It gained over 1,400 likes over the same timeframe.
